Video.summary: If you like extreme high-flying action, the Metrodome is the place to be! Fifteen of the biggest and baddest monster trucks take the stage in Minneapolis with freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into Resch Center for Round 14 of Arena in 30 - with freestyle and racing fun.
Video.title: Resch Center - Green Bay, WI

Video.summary: The Metrodome is hot with anticipation of Monster Jam freestyle during the 2000 season of Monster Jam.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Ride along with Monster Jam as we rewind to the unforgettable World Finals freestyle debuts of past Rookie of the Year & Rising Star award winners! Witness the explosive runs the very year they clinched those prestigious titles.Catch a glimpse of the humble beginnings of drivers like Coty Saucier, Camden Murphy, Jamie Sullivan, and more. These are the moments that started it all!
Video.title: Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation

Image.alt: Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation
Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation
Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation

Video.summary: Catch up on all the Monster Jam racing action from the Georgia Dome on February 16, 2013.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2009 season continues with epic freestyle action from Angel Stadium of Anaheim, on January 10, 2009.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to the racing capital of the world, Indianapolis, with Stadium Championship Series Blue. Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga continues to ride a wave of momentum as he tries to win his 6th Overall Event Championship of the season while Colt Stephens looks to climb up the series points leaderboard by earning his second consecutive Freestyle win.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Tune in LIVE as Monster Jam rolls into Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
Video.title: LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026

Image.alt: LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Birmingham, AL - 3/28/2026

Video.summary: Check out the fun freestyle action from Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2011.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Back at the GelreDome in Holland, Monster Jam's trucks compete for victory on September 30, 2012.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Holland

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West heads to the Pacific Northwest as Ryan Anderson looks to lead Son-uva Digger to the West series championship while Avenger’s Jim Koehler brings the excitement to his quest for a freestyle win.
Video.title: Lumen Field - Seattle, WA

Video.summary: Hang on tight! Monster Jam races into the Georgia Dome with more thrills and cheers on February 12, 2011.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta, Georgia.
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Stadium - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Your favorite trucks and drivers compete with freestyle action from the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Buckle up for awesome freestyle action from all three shows at the GelreDome, on September 26–27, 2009.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Netherlands - Freestyle

Video.summary: Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson looks for back-to-back event championships. Joe Foley attempts to drive El Toro Loco to consecutive freestyle wins and only four points separates the top three as the battle for series points lead heats up.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Buckle in for all the Racing and Freestyle Monster Jam action at Raymond James Stadium on January 22, 2015!
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into MetLife Stadium on June 13, 2015!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Image.alt: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Video.summary: It's become the hottest ticket in "Hotlanta"- a ticket to see the superstars of Monster Jam perform at the Georgia Dome. Don't miss the racing action from Atlanta, GA, on January 13, 2007!
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss the awesome freestyle action from the RCA Dome, on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2013 season makes its way to Raymond James Stadium on February 2, 2013 with some racing from your favorite drivers and trucks.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West continues the rush through the Golden State. Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson brings the series points lead to San Diego. Camden Murphy looks to fly the Dragonoid to its first freestyle win, while Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson tries for his series leading 4th racing win of the season.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to the Music City for the biggest event of the year, as the sports best and brightest compete at Monster Jam World Finals XXII in Nashville. Two World Champions will be crowned in the Great Clips Two Wheel Skills Challenge and BKT Racing when the action kicks off at Nissan Stadium.
Video.title: World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Image.alt: World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN
World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN
World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: Recorded LIVE from Sam Boyd Stadium, don't miss all the exciting racing action from Monster Jam World Finals 5 on March 20, 2004.
Video.title: World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues with round 17 at FLA Live Arena in Sunrise FL
Video.title: FLA Live Arena - Sunrise, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 13 at Heritage Bank Center in Cincinnati, OH.
Video.title: Heritage Bank Center - Cincinnati, OH - Day 1

Image.alt: Heritage Bank Center - Cincinnati, OH - Day 1
Heritage Bank Center - Cincinnati, OH - Day 1
Heritage Bank Center - Cincinnati, OH - Day 1

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series East takes over the Amica Mutual Pavilion in Providence, Rhode Island. Krysten Anderson looks to keep the series points lead as strong challengers’ loom in a freestyle battle royal.
Video.title: Amica Mutual Pavilion - Providence, RI

Video.summary: It's Primetime in St. Louis as Stadium Championship East continues for Round 5.
Video.title: The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis

Image.alt: The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis
The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis
The Dome at America’s Center - St. Louis

Video.summary: Atlanta Motor Speedway hosts Monster Jam for a night of racing, skills, and freestyle action.
Video.title: Atlanta Motor Speedway - Atlanta, GA
